testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-flow components > binds graph designer inputs to route-like scope and graph ids
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > publishes the active draft graph through the Flow API contract
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > surfaces publish failures and labels published versions
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > surfaces the first-run scope empty state intent
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > surfaces the active-scope empty graph intent without stale canvas data
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > keeps the empty state action output host-controlled
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > renders graph canvas selection outputs without mutating layout inputs
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > loads paged open-task analytics envelopes
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > omits query options when API filters are absent
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > captures analytics load failures from Error and non-Error throwables
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > loads run summaries and captures non-Error failures
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > loads forms, fills, tasks, and waivers with optional filters and error branches
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > describes branch: distinguishes empty filters and fallback load errors across flow lists
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > loads the my-tasks inbox with signal state and tenant refreshes
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > normalizes my-tasks polling input and captures fallback load errors
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > supports fill editor answer lookup and bulk save intent
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > covers form and dialog event defaults
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > normalizes typed fill editor values for package hosts
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > covers fill editor empty, object option, and fallback serialization branches
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > describes branch: normalizes nullish persisted fill values and sparse option records
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > keeps task card action outputs permission-scoped by intent
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > keeps fill reveal, text-mode, collection, and signature guard branches observable
@stynx-web/angular-flow components > keeps flow design dialog defaults and output payloads observable
FlowApiService endpoint contract > covers design route families for scopes, graphs, nodes, edges, rules, effects, and form gates
FlowApiService endpoint contract > covers forms, fills, answers, waivers, policies, analytics, signal, and effect routes
FlowApiService endpoint contract > covers runtime, task action, candidate, user lookup, and event routes
FlowApiService endpoint contract > omits query options for absent or undefined filters
@stynx-web/angular-flow FE-G fan-out > activates each flow route with the real Router when permissions allow
@stynx-web/angular-flow FE-G fan-out > redirects every guarded flow route to permission denial when the session lacks access
@stynx-web/angular-flow FE-G fan-out > loads dashboard analytics filters, formats percentages, and ignores stale refreshes
@stynx-web/angular-flow FE-G fan-out > loads run activity pages, appends older events, and clears when no run is selected
@stynx-web/angular-flow FE-G fan-out > handles file answers, signatures, and reveal conditions in the fill editor
@stynx-web/angular-flow FE-G fan-out > wires provideStynxFlow for instance-backed and factory-backed package hosts
@stynx-web/angular-flow exports and routes > exports the package API needed by host shells
@stynx-web/angular-flow exports and routes > returns a defensive copy of host-mountable routes
@stynx-web/angular-flow exports and routes > keeps PORM-derived route concepts and STYNX route names visible
@stynx-web/angular-flow exports and routes > keeps each flow route mounted to the intended component and guarded permission surface
